subject: [CDS] Update the CDS blueprintprocessor
commit_message:
[CDS] Update the CDS blueprintprocessor

Fixed recent bugs i.e. for rest clients or UAT tests

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3767
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
